results.title: Hakimi says he’s become ‘an easy target’ as court rejects appeal and confirms rape trial
results.description: Achraf Hakimi will stand trial on rape charges, which he denies, calling himself an “easy target” after the court rejected his appeal.

results.title: IndiGo Plane Bound For Agartala Struck By Lightning At Kolkata Airport Amid Storm
results.description: IndiGo Airbus A320neo from Kolkata to Agartala was hit by lightning while parked, passengers deboarded safely.

results.title: Shocking Scenes! Amateur Football Player Reportedly Passes Away After Collision With Rival Goalkeeper During Match | Video
results.description: A tragic incident during an amateur football match in Ghana has shocked the sporting community after a player reportedly died following a collision with an opposing goalkeeper. He suffered a severe head injury during a challenge for the ball. Authorities are investigating the incident, while the case has sparked debate over player safety, medical support, and responsibility in amateur football.

results.title: Porsche CEO aims to finalise new cost-cutting package by July
results.description: Porsche's CEO anticipates a swift resolution to cost-cutting talks, aiming for employee agreement before July holidays to provide clarity. The company plans to reduce production and make money with fewer cars, following previous job cuts. Porsche is also set for closer collaboration with Audi and will continue its entry-level 718 series, as it navigates challenges like tariffs and geopolitical issues.
